__description: Customer profiles for SQL customer_profiles table (CustomerProfile ORM). Based on kho_du_lieu_cung.json user/shop schema extended with churn/emotion analytics. Include 4 segments: vip, regular, new, at_risk. customer_id must match chat_messages.json.

customer_profiles.customer_id: <string: unique customer ID — must match chat_messages.json>
customer_profiles.notes: <string: internal CRM note for chatbot personalization — mention purchase patterns, known preferences, issues>
